title: hpc-status skill return envelope
description: Return envelope written by the hpc-status sub-skill at <experiment_dir>/.hpc/_returns/hpc-status.json. Covers both the snapshot (single primitive) and blocking-poll (worker handoff) branches. oneOf [Success, Error].

lifecycle_state.description: The terminal or interim lifecycle state from the underlying status / monitor-flow envelope (running / pending / complete / terminal_with_failures / terminal_no_progress, etc.).

next_step_hint.description: Suggested follow-on action for the parent (e.g. 'aggregate', 'monitor'). Populated by the skill's Step 5 decision logic.

failed_task_ids.description: Per-task failures (when lifecycle_state == terminal_with_failures); null when not applicable.

resubmit_run_id.description: When the skill auto-resubmitted failures within the threshold, the new run_id; otherwise null.

decisions.description: Decision log entries the skill accumulated (mirrors the standard worker-report decisions list).
